name: API Platform Engineer Pack
description: Workflows for coding agents building API platforms: GraphQL and REST schema design, stable interface contracts, contract testing, source-grounded implementation, and security hardening.
useCases: Design REST or GraphQL APIs with stable contracts, versioning, validation, and clear ownership.
Implement platform API changes with contract tests, compatibility checks, and observability.
Review API migrations for breaking changes, client impact, security, and rollout readiness.
Create source-grounded docs and examples for local coding agents consuming internal APIs.
examplePrompts: Design this API contract with endpoints or schema, validation rules, errors, versioning, and tests.
Implement this API platform change with contract tests, compatibility checks, and telemetry.
Review this API migration for breaking changes, client impact, auth gaps, and rollout risks.
Write concise API usage docs and examples grounded in the current implementation and tests.
